title: hagah #1897
definition:
1) to moan, growl, utter, muse, mutter, meditate, devise, plot, speak
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to roar, growl, groan
        1a2) to utter, speak
        1a3) to meditate, devise, muse, imagine
    1b) (Poal) to utter
    1c) (Hiphil) to mutter
nasbUsage:

    NASB:  to moan, growl, utter, speak, muse
